creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
% cd /usr/ports/databases/phppgadmin
% make install do-clean
===> Fetching all distfiles required by phppgadmin-5.1_1 for building
===>  Extracting for phppgadmin-5.1_1
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for phpPgAdmin-5.1.tar.bz2.
===>  Patching for phppgadmin-5.1_1
===>  Configuring for phppgadmin-5.1_1
/usr/bin/sed -i.bak -e "s|/usr/bin/pg|/usr/local/bin/pg|"  /usr/ports/works/usr/ports/databases/phppgadmin/work/phpPgAdmin-5.1/conf/config.inc.php-dist
/bin/rm -f -f /usr/ports/works/usr/ports/databases/phppgadmin/work/phpPgAdmin-5.1/conf/config.inc.php  /usr/ports/works/usr/ports/databases/phppgadmin/work/phpPgAdmin-5.1/conf/config.inc.php-dist.bak
===>  Staging for phppgadmin-5.1_1
===>   Generating temporary packing list
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/works/usr/ports/databases/phppgadmin/work/stage/usr/local/www/phpPgAdmin
/bin/cp -Rp /usr/ports/works/usr/ports/databases/phppgadmin/work/phpPgAdmin-5.1/ /usr/ports/works/usr/ports/databases/phppgadmin/work/stage/usr/local/www/phpPgAdmin/
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
===>  Installing for phppgadmin-5.1_1
===>  Checking if phppgadmin already installed
===>   Registering installation for phppgadmin-5.1_1
Installing phppgadmin-5.1_1...
cp: /usr/local/www/data-dist/phpPgAdmin/conf/config.inc.php: No such file or directory
